Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Renfei]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 22''' — Renfei is a member of the Skysworn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 22''' — Renfei is a partner of Bai Rou.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 22''' — Renfei carries a hammer.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — Renfei carries a dark hammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — Renfei is calm and composed with black hair in a tail and a gray cloud hovering over her head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — Renfei is a Skysworn who uses a hammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 8''' — Pai Ren is a member of the Skysworn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 11''' — Renfei is a Highgold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — Renfei helped drag Lindon into a building.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 13''' — Renfei scanned the host before allowing her into the Skysworn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 15''' — Renfei is a member of the group supervising Lindon's squad.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — Renfei stands on dark platforms of solid cloud generated with her madra.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 2''' — Renfei is a Skysworn with an authoritative voice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 2''' — Renfei uses Cloud Hammer madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 2''' — Renfei is a character who can use dark cloud as an attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 3''' — Renfei was cycling madra that drew wisps of dark cloud around her armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 3''' — Renfei was a Truegold from the Cloud Hammer sect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 4''' — Renfei sent a message to Bai Rou regarding multiple enemies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 7''' — Renfei is someone Mercy mentioned.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Renfei is a person Naru Gwei is involved with.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 4''' — Renfei is dead.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 16''' — Renfei has the Path of the Cloud Hammer.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
